headline: AT&T vs Verizon. One of These Telecoms Has Raised Its Dividend 20 Straight Times and the Market Is Finally Noticing
summary: AT&T (NYSE:T) and Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ) both posted 2.9% revenue growth in Q1 2026, yet the businesses behind those identical top lines look very different. AT&T is digesting the Lumen fiber acquisition that closed in early February 2026, while Verizon is now run by Daniel Schulman and absorbing Frontier, which closed January 20, 2026. Two ... headline: VZ Gains From Solid Traction in the Consumer Segment: Will it Sustain?
summary: Verizon adds postpaid phone users for the first time since 2013, as broadband growth and the Frontier deal boost retention.

headline: Eight Leading U.S. Communications Firms Form C2 ISAC to Strengthen Cybersecurity Collaboration
summary: Eight of the nation's leading communications companies – AT&T, Charter, Comcast, Cox, Lumen Technologies, T-Mobile, Verizon, and Zayo – have established the Communications Cybersecurity Information Sharing and Analysis Center, known as C2 ISAC. The new non-profit is dedicated to strengthening cybersecurity across the communications sector.

headline: AT&T (T) Valuation Check After New Satellite Connectivity Joint Venture With T-Mobile And Verizon
summary: AT&T (T) stock is back in focus after the company, alongside T-Mobile and Verizon, outlined plans for a new joint venture that would pool spectrum for satellite supported mobile coverage across the United States. See our latest analysis for AT&T. AT&T's share price has eased in recent months, with a 30 day share price return down 7.85% and a 90 day return down 14.82%. At the same time, the satellite joint venture and recent conference update keep attention on its longer term position,...

headline: 3 Dow Jones Stocks We Find Risky
summary: The Dow Jones (^DJI) is made up of 30 of the most established and influential companies in the market. But even blue-chip stocks can struggle - some are dealing with slowing growth, outdated business models, or increasing competition.
